title: Wolverhampton Camping Shop & Coven Canal Walk

main_route.excerpt: Simon, Eve, John, Charles went to the camping shop beyond Wolverhampton, to buy air mattresses, deck chairs, 3 legged stools.
We lunched in the van & drove to Coven. At Coven we had a pretty walk along the canal before setting off home.

boundary_flags: Page A_0199_L is shared with at least one other trip entry (May 17th Derbyshire trip); only the May 10th entry belongs to this trip.
summary: A day trip on Saturday 10 May 1997: Simon, Eve, John and Charles (with the dog Tonic) drove north-west of Birmingham to a camping shop beyond Wolverhampton to buy outdoor equipment, then lunched in the van before stopping at Coven for a walk along the canal and returning home the same day.
extraction_notes: The page (A_0199_L) carries two separate diary entries: May 10th (this trip) and May 17th (a separate Derbyshire/Calke Abbey trip). Only the May 10th entry is extracted here. The camping shop is described as 'beyond Wolverhampton' with no further name or address given; Wolverhampton is used as the geocodable anchor (approximate: true). The dog is referred to as 'Tonic' in this entry rather than 'Tinder'; this may be a nickname or a different pet — noted for the reviewer.
